title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: How does the employee referral program and bonus policy work?
A: Our employee referral program encourages staff to refer qualified candidates for open positions. If your referral is hired and successfully completes the probationary period, you will be eligible for a referral bonus. The bonus amount varies depending on the level of the position filled. To participate, submit your referral through the designated internal portal before the candidate applies. Make sure to follow up with HR to confirm your referral was received. Bonuses are typically paid out in the pay period following the new hire's probationary period completion.
